name: Each Other
short_description: In this new puzzle game, guide Edwin and Judy through an original story and many levels. And help them to avoid the eye of the supervisors and to escape from their orphanage for the least strange...
detailed_description:
Each Other is a new top-down puzzle game solo in pixel art.
Through four chapters composed of 15 levels each, the player controls Edwin and Judy, 2 characters responding at the same time to the same controls.

The goal is to bring them to the two exits (hatches), while avoiding the different obstacles (holes, enemies, etc...), in order to pass to the next level. Throughout the chapters you'll follow their story while they move through the different floors of their orphanage.




It is thanks to your support that Each Other obtains this 8th place of the TOP 10 games of February! Thanks so much! 👁
You can still support the game until the end of the Game Development World Championship here ->

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Korean, Spanish - Latin America, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian
